utility_evaluation.REASONING:
There are 5 items requested in the final format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. All 5 items appear in the final coverage plan. Now check if each is fully specified with required details:
- health_coverage: Requires physical and mental health insurance with costs. Plan states provider, plan details indicating both physical and mental health, and cost €165/month. Fully specified.
- property_coverage: Requires home/contents insurance with costs. Plan provides provider, plan details focused on professional equipment up to €5,000, cost €90/month. It is property-related and includes costs; while it emphasizes equipment rather than full home/contents, the format only requires home/contents insurance with costs. This is arguably acceptable as property coverage with costs; consider it specified.
- travel_coverage: Requires travel insurance with costs. Plan provides provider, plan details including adventure travel add-on and weather deductible waiver, and cost €130/month. Fully specified.
- additional_services: Requires any enhancement services with costs. Plan includes a named service, description, and €0/month cost. Fully specified.
- total_budget: Requires complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. Plan provides only total_monthly_cost €385, no annual figure. The format asks for complete monthly/annual cost breakdown; annual cost is missing, so this item is not fully specified.
Thus, 4 of 5 items are fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final plan includes: Health: LifeFirst Standard Plan (provider LifeFirst) which maps to primary_health_coverage.physical_health -> LifeFirst Standard Plan with rating 9. Property: PrimeHome Premium Coverage (provider PrimeHome) which maps to property_protection.home_content -> PrimeHome Premium Coverage with rating 3. Travel: InsurePlus Standard Plan with Adventure Travel Coverage add-on and waiver. The base travel plan maps to mobility_coverage.travel_insurance -> InsurePlus Standard Plan with rating 10. The add-on Adventure Travel Coverage maps to travel_enhancement_services -> Adventure Travel Coverage with rating 10. The waiver for weather-related deductibles is not a listed standalone item in ground-truth, so no separate mapping. Additional service 'Freelancer Priority Account' is not in ground-truth; no rating.
